stages.name: Foundation
stages.goal: Repository docs, Rust scaffold, CI, agent rules.
success: All commands pass when Rust toolchain is available.

stages.name: Direct Mock Baseline
stages.goal: Measure direct mock/upstream performance without gateway.
success: 1000 VUs run with less than 0.1% HTTP errors.

stages.name: Telemetry Ring Buffer
stages.goal: Add bounded in-memory telemetry without blocking response.
success: RPS with telemetry >= 98% of proxy without telemetry.

stages.name: Zero-Copy Memory Validation
success: No per-chunk JSON object allocation in pass-through.

stages.name: Async Micro-batching
success: Client latency does not wait for disk.

stages.name: Upstream Real / vLLM Native Parity
stages.goal: Swap mock for Ollama or vLLM and validate real streaming plus direct vLLM parity when available.
success: TTFT is measured on first useful delta.
Gateway RPS >= 98% of direct vLLM in the same environment.
Gateway P99 is approximately flat against direct vLLM.
